title: Timestamp naming conventions
summary: The Feature defines a UTC-only naming policy for in-scope temporal artifacts, migrates existing paths with a dry-run-first workflow, and rewrites references that name migrated paths. It also updates lib/memory/handbook/inbox-lifecycle.md so human-generated inbox artifacts use the same two time-prefix segments before…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: When the migration-write follow-up starts, the tech-lead MUST plan an implement task that preserves the dry-run manifest and requires PANCREATOR_MIGRATION_GO=1 before any rename write occurs.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
